# Plan: Gherkin block indentation

## Context

The editor currently renders all Gherkin blocks flush-left. The goal is to add
visual left-indentation that mirrors the Gherkin hierarchy — Feature at the
margin, Scenario/Background/Rule indented one level, and steps (Given/When/
Then/And/But) indented a second level.

## Target appearance

![Indentation mockup](data:image/png;base64,)

```
Feature: Login Validation
  Scenario Outline: Checking various username...
    Given a user attempts to log in with "<U...
    Then the system should grant access: "<A...
```

## Indentation levels

| Level | Block types                           | padding-left |
|-------|---------------------------------------|-------------|
| 0     | `feature`                             | 0 (unchanged) |
| 1     | `rule`, `background`, `scenario`      | 1.5rem      |
| 2     | `given`, `when`, `then`, `and`, `but` | 3rem        |

## Spec update (implement first, per spec-first convention)

Add §3.10 to `spec/03-editor.md`:

```markdown
## 3.10 Block indentation

**Given** the editor contains a `feature` block
**Then** it is rendered flush with the editor left margin

**Given** the editor contains a `rule`, `background`, or `scenario` block
**Then** it is visually indented one level from the `feature` block

**Given** the editor contains a `given`, `when`, `then`, `and`, or `but` block
**Then** it is visually indented two levels from the `feature` block

**And** this indentation is purely visual and does not affect the document
structure or export output
```

## CSS change

File: `src/app/globals.css`

Insert after the existing block-label rules (after line 248, before the
separator comment at line 250):

```css
/* Gherkin hierarchy indentation */
.gherkin-editor p[data-gherkin-type="rule"],
.gherkin-editor p[data-gherkin-type="background"],
.gherkin-editor p[data-gherkin-type="scenario"] {
  padding-left: 1.5rem;
}

.gherkin-editor p[data-gherkin-type="given"],
.gherkin-editor p[data-gherkin-type="when"],
.gherkin-editor p[data-gherkin-type="then"],
.gherkin-editor p[data-gherkin-type="and"],
.gherkin-editor p[data-gherkin-type="but"] {
  padding-left: 3rem;
}
```

## Files to change

1. `spec/03-editor.md` — append §3.10 (spec first)
2. `src/app/globals.css` — add indentation CSS after line 248

## Files not to touch

- `src/lib/gherkin.ts` — on the Do Not Touch list
- `src/components/GherkinEditor.tsx` — no changes needed; indentation is
  purely presentational CSS

## E2e impact

Grepped `e2e/` — no existing test checks `padding-left` or `margin-left`.
Tests in visual-separation, enter-progression, block-picker, export, toolbar,
and collaboration use `data-gherkin-type` selectors for presence/text/border
assertions only — they will not be affected.

## Verification

1. `npm run dev` → open http://localhost:3000
2. Create a session; type a Feature block, press Enter to get Scenario, press
   Enter to get Given — confirm three distinct indent levels match the mockup.
3. Export the document; confirm indentation does not appear in the text output.
4. `npm run test` — all existing tests pass.
